Assets News dApp Account
Power by %1$s
Create Password This password will unlock your Cryptooly wallet only on this service I under stand that Cryptooly cannot recover this password for me. Learn more
Secure Your Wallet Don\'t risk losing your funds. protect your wallet by saving your seed phrase in a place you trust. It\'s the only way to recover your wallet if you get locked out of the app or get a new device.
Write Down Your Seed Phrase This is your seed phrase. Write it down on a paper and keep it in a safe place. You\'ll be asked to re-enter this phrase (in order) on the next step. Import From Seed Import New password Confirm password Seed phrase Tap to reveal your seed phrase Create Wallet Restore Wallet Enter 6 digits password Please Enter 6 digits password again
Continue Cancel Confirm Back Enter text… Copy Parse
